notableEvents.label: Bo Bichette GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Bo Bichette grounds into a double play, pitcher Tyler Phillips to second baseman Xavier Edwards to first baseman Christopher Morel. Carson Benge out at 2nd. Bo Bichette out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Vidal Bruján hits a sacrifice bunt. Throwing error by third baseman Leo Jiménez. Marcus Semien to 3rd. Vidal Bruján to 1st.
